caribbean.headline: Light Winds and Moderate Rain Affect San Juan Today
caribbean.paragraph: San Juan is experiencing light winds up to 12 knots with moderate seas reaching 2.9 feet and a dominant NNE swell period of 12 seconds. Rain probability is high at 79 percent, indicating scattered showers impacting the region while Ocho Rios remains mostly calm with winds near 8 knots.

mediterranean.headline: Moderate Winds and Elevated Seas Impact Mykonos Today
mediterranean.paragraph: Mykonos is experiencing moderate northeast winds sustained at 22 knots with wave heights reaching 7.5 feet and a swell period of 9 seconds from the NNE. These conditions indicate a Small Craft Advisory scenario with minimal rain probability at 8 percent, while Cadiz remains calmer with winds at 16 knots and lower sea states.
